news.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
news.summary: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

news.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
news.summary: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

news.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
news.summary: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

news.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
news.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

news.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
news.summary: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

news.title: Ikea’s smart donut lamp is a sweet treat
news.summary: Ikea's popular Varmblixt lamp just got a smart home glow-up. The delightfully bulbous light now features color-changing, dimming, and smart home control. news.title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
news.summary: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. news.summary: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo ($499 for students) has sent shockwaves through the PC ecosystem, and now Microsoft is responding with deals targeting students in the US. news.title: Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale features deals on dozens of our favorite gadgets
news.summary: If you missed out on Amazon’s recent spring sales event, Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale presents yet another opportunity to score steep discounts on some of our favorite gadgets. news.summary: "If the spacecraft is ready to go, that's going to give it a priority."

news.title: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
news.summary: Trump FCC starts handing out exemptions to its ban on foreign-made routers.

news.summary: This is a big step in a new strategic direction for Adobe.

news.title: US jobs too important to risk Chinese car imports, says Ford CEO
news.summary: China has enough spare capacity to swallow the entire US car market, says Ford's Jim Farley.

news.title: Good Omens S3 trailer sets up a blessed conclusion
news.summary: Prime Video's supernatural comedy will end with a special 90-minute final episode.

news.title: NASA Wants to Put Nuclear Reactors on the Moon
news.summary: The White House has announced that NASA will work with the Departments of Defense and Energy to put nuclear reactors in orbit and on the surface of the moon.

news.title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
news.summary: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

news.title: Microsoft Surface PCs Are Getting Big Price Hikes, and the Cheaper Models Are Going Away
news.summary: The price increases range from $200 to $300, and Microsoft doesn’t sell a sub-$1,000 Surface anymore. The rising cost of consumer tech is a common theme in 2026.

news.title: Why Amazon Is Buying Globalstar—and What It Means for Your iPhone
news.summary: Amazon is paying more than $11 billion for a small satellite company.

news.title: The US Government Will Ask Data Centers How Much Power They Use
news.summary: In a letter obtained by WIRED, the Energy Information Administration tells two senators that it plans to develop a mandatory assessment of data centers' energy use.
